bids.reasoning: The opponent opened with all valueC across every issue, which gives me minimum utility on everything (0.20 per issue weighted). The opponent is claiming "win-win" and "balance" but their bid is all valueC for every issue, which gives me minimum utility (0.2 per issue). This is completely lopsided in their favor, not mine. I'm at t=0.02, very early in the negotiation, so I should hold firm near my ideal bid. I'll counter with all valueA again (my maximum utility), as the opponent has shown zero concession so far.
